decks.notes: This Dimir Tempo deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while maintaining aggression with efficient creatures and removal spells. By utilizing cards like Force of Will, Daze, and Thoughtseize to disrupt the opponent's strategy, the deck aims to control the pace of the game and maintain board presence with creatures like Murktide Regent and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. The inclusion of Wasteland also allows for land disruption, increasing the deck's ability to disrupt opponent's mana base. Overall, this deck aims to apply pressure while disrupting the opponent's plays to secure a victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing cards like Green Sun's Zenith, Gaea's Cradle, and Natural Order to ramp up and control the board. It aims to quickly assemble a strong creature base with cards like Badgermole Cub and Wight of the Reliquary, while disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Thoughtseize and Endurance. The deck also has a toolbox approach with creatures like Collector Ouphe and Atraxa, Grand Unifier available to handle different situations. The key strategy is to outvalue the opponent with efficient creatures and disruptive spells while maintaining control of the game.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan with counterspells like Force of Will and disruptive creatures like Nethergoyf, while also maintaining card advantage with cards like Baleful Strix and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. The deck aims to control the board with removal spells like Fatal Push and Snuff Out, while also applying pressure with aggressive creatures like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares. By utilizing the tempo advantage provided by cards like Daze and Brazen Borrower, the deck aims to outmaneuver opponents and finish them off quickly with efficient threats.

The deck focuses on using cards like Dark Ritual, Doomsday, and Thassa's Oracle to set up a game-winning combo quickly. The main objective is to control the opponent's resources with cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Will while setting up the Doomsday combo. By using cards like Polluted Delta and Ponder to filter through the deck, the player aims to assemble the perfect combination of cards to win the game in a single turn. The deck also includes protection spells like Daze and Misdirection to prevent the opponent from disrupting the combo.

The deck focuses on utilizing a combination of removal spells and counterspells to control the board while also leveraging card advantage and resource management through cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Leyline Binding. It also aims to ramp up its resources using cards like Up the Beanstalk and Life from the Loam, while also utilizing disruptive lands like Karakas and Wasteland. The deck seeks to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents by efficiently answering threats and setting up its own win conditions with cards like Murktide Regent and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd.

The deck revolves around utilizing the Cephalid Illusionist and Nomads en-Kor combo to quickly mill through the deck and get key pieces into the graveyard. By using cards like Cabal Therapy and Dread Return, the deck can easily bring back key combo pieces like Thassa's Oracle to win the game. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares to control the board and protect the combo. Urza's Saga is used to tutor for important artifacts like Shuko and Meticulous Archive to further streamline the combo.

The focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and removal spells, while also utilizing discard effects to disrupt their game plan. The combination of Orcish Bowmasters and Amped Raptor provides a strong aggressive start, while cards like Thoughtseize and Cabal Therapy help disrupt the opponent's hand. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional threats and pressure, while Swords to Plowshares offers efficient removal. The deck is built to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain that pressure throughout the game, aiming to close out the game quickly.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the Painter's Servant and grindstone combo to mill your opponent's entire deck in one turn. By using cards like Goblin Welder and Goblin Engineer to search for and recur key combo pieces, as well as protection spells like Pyroblast and Red Elemental Blast, you can disrupt your opponent's game plan while setting up for your lethal combo. The deck also utilizes mana acceleration with cards like Mox Opal and Lotus Petal to quickly get your combo online and win the game before your opponent can react.

This Dimir Tempo deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with efficient creatures. The deck includes powerful disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will, along with efficient threats like Murktide Regent and Brazen Borrower. The deck also uses Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's mana base and control the board. With a mix of disruption, tempo, and threats, this deck aims to control the game and win quickly by disrupting the opponent's plays while developing its own board presence.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on fast, aggressive plays to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of efficient creature threats and powerful removal spells. The deck's key strategy is to apply early pressure with creatures like Amped Raptor and Ocelot Pride, while disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Cabal Therapy. With a combination of strong creatures, disruptive spells, and powerful removal, the deck aims to quickly close out the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

This Legacy Eldrazi Aggro deck focuses on quickly ramping out Eldrazi creatures using powerful mana acceleration cards like Eldrazi Temple and Eye of Ugin. By playing Chalice of the Void to disrupt opponents' strategies and using Cavern of Souls to protect Eldrazi creatures from counterspells, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast and aggressive board presence. With cards like Thought-Knot Seer and Reality Smasher providing additional disruption and damage, this deck is designed to push for a fast win before opponents can establish their own game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize aggressive creatures like Delver of Secrets and Dragon's Rage Channeler to quickly apply pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan with cards like Wasteland and Force of Will. The deck also features card selection and tempo plays with Brainstorm and Ponder, as well as additional threats like Murktide Regent and Brazen Borrower. The inclusion of various counterspells and removal spells helps to control the game and protect the deck's aggressive strategy. Overall, this deck aims to be fast, disruptive, and versatile in a Legacy 1 vs 1 format.

This deck focuses on aggressive play, utilizing efficient creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent to quickly apply pressure to the opponent. The deck also includes disruptive spells like Force of Will and Daze to protect its threats and control the game. By combining aggressive creatures with versatile spells and land disruption, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and maintain tempo throughout the game. Additionally, cards like Brazen Borrower and Unholy Heat provide additional versatility and answers to different types of threats.

The deck focuses on aggressively disrupting the opponent's game plan while maintaining tempo advantage through efficient spells and creatures. It aims to control the board with disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will, while deploying threats like Brazen Borrower and Murktide Regent to apply pressure. The deck also utilizes mana denial with cards like Wasteland and Orcish Bowmasters, to limit the opponent's resources. Overall, it aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy and clock them with efficient threats to secure the win.

This Dimir Tempo deck focuses on quick, efficient plays to disrupt the opponent's game plan and gain control of the battlefield. Using cards like Brainstorm and Ponder for card selection, along with disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push, the deck aims to maintain tempo and pressure the opponent. With powerful threats like Murktide Regent and Barrowgoyf, as well as Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student for card advantage, the deck looks to end the game quickly while denying the opponent resources with cards like Wasteland and Daze.

The deck focuses on cheating powerful creatures such as Griselbrand, Emrakul, and Atraxa into play quickly and efficiently using Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. Using cards like Ponder, Brainstorm, and Stock Up, the deck aims to find these key combo pieces as soon as possible. It also includes protection with cards like Force of Will and Flusterstorm. Overall, the strategy revolves around building a strong board presence by playing big threats before the opponent can react effectively, allowing for quick and potent wins.
